title: Finding GPT-4’s mistakes with GPT-4

title: A Holistic Approach to Undesired Content Detection in the Real World
titleZh: 现实世界中不受欢迎的内容检测的整体方法
summary: We present a holistic approach to building a robust and useful natural language classification system for real-world content moderation.
summaryZh: 我们提出了一种全面的方法来构建一个强大而有用的自然语言分类系统，用于现实世界的内容审核。
highlights: We present a holistic approach to building a robust and useful natural language classification system for real-world content moderation.

title: Consistency Models
summary: Diffusion models have significantly advanced the fields of image, audio, and video generation, but they depend on an iterative sampling process that causes slow generation.
summaryZh: 扩散模型在图像、音频和视频生成领域取得了显著进步，但它们依赖于导致生成缓慢的迭代采样过程。
highlights: Diffusion models have significantly advanced the fields of image, audio, and video generation, but they depend on an iterative sampling process that causes slow generation.
highlightsZh: 扩散模型在图像、音频和视频生成领域取得了显著进步，但它们依赖于导致生成缓慢的迭代采样过程。

title: Improved Techniques for Training Consistency Models
titleZh: 改进的一致性模型训练技术
summary: Consistency models are a nascent family of generative models that can sample high quality data in one step without the need for adversarial training.
summaryZh: 一致性模型是一个新兴的生成模型家族，可以一步采样高质量数据，而无需对抗训练。
highlights: Consistency models are a nascent family of generative models that can sample high quality data in one step without the need for adversarial training.

title: Surging developer productivity with custom GPTs
titleZh: 使用自定义GPT提高开发人员生产力
summary: Paf adopted ChatGPT Enterprise across its entire company, with engineers using custom GPTs on a daily basis to speed up routine development tasks. Paf also integrated ChatGPT Enterprise into the grit:lab coding academy (gritlab.ax), training the next generation of software developers using an AI-augmented, systems-arch

title: Using GPT-4o reasoning to transform cancer care
titleZh: 使用GPT-4o推理转变癌症护理
summary: Color Health is working with OpenAI to pioneer a new way of accelerating cancer patients’ access to treatment. Their new Cancer Copilot application uses GPT-4o to identify missing diagnostics and create tailored workup plans, enabling healthcare providers to make evidence-based decisions about cancer screening and trea
summaryZh: Color Health正在与OpenAI合作，开创一种加速癌症患者获得治疗的新方法。他们新的癌症Copilot应用程序使用GPT-4o来识别缺失的诊断并创建量身定制的检查计划，使医疗保健提供者能够就癌症筛查和治疗做出基于证据的决策

title: Extracting Concepts from GPT-4
summary: Using new techniques for scaling sparse autoencoders, we automatically identified 16 million patterns in GPT-4's computations.
